description: Join the Binance Africa P2P team for day two of the DeFi Masterclass, focusing on peer-to-peer trading. Learn about the importance and practicalities of P2P trading, including how to get started and the benefits it offers. Participants can also engage in a $5,000 giveaway by completing specific tasks during the session.
topic_summary: This session covers peer-to-peer trading as a fundamental aspect of decentralized finance, discussing its significance and practical applications. The agenda includes an introduction to P2P trading, its history, and how to participate effectively.
aliases: Defi And Binance Smart Chain Masterclass
